since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.77%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.58% · BTC -3.96% · Gold -2.62% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.77%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.77%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.93%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +6.29%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +6.29%, PUBM +3.65%, ZBRA +3.56%, WDAY +3.43%, INTU +3.30%. Laggards: SMR -5.24%, OKLO -4.69%, OKLO -4.69%, ORCL -4.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.04% at $157.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
